'''pochakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhabdomyoblastic|rhabdomyoblastic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhabdomyoblastic|rhabdomyoblastic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pochakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochakithi|pochakithi]] || [[word:pochakiji|pochakiji]] || [[word:pochakishi|pochakishi]] || [[word:pochakiki|pochakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochakuthuthu|pochakuthuthu]] || [[word:pochakujuju|pochakujuju]] || [[word:pochakushushu|pochakushushu]] || [[word:pochakukuku|pochakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochakuthu|pochakuthu]] || [[word:pochakuju|pochakuju]] || [[word:pochakushu|pochakushu]] || [[word:pochakuku|pochakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochakufthuf|pochakufthuf]] || [[word:pochakufjuf|pochakufjuf]] || [[word:pochakufshuf|pochakufshuf]] || [[word:pochakufkuf|pochakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochakethe|pochakethe]] || [[word:pochakeje|pochakeje]] || [[word:pochakeshe|pochakeshe]] || [[word:pochakeke|pochakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochakothotho|pochakothotho]] || [[word:pochakojojo|pochakojojo]] || [[word:pochakoshosho|pochakoshosho]] || [[word:pochakokoko|pochakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochakotho|pochakotho]] || [[word:pochakojo|pochakojo]] || [[word:pochakosho|pochakosho]] || [[word:pochakoko|pochakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochakofthof|pochakofthof]] || [[word:pochakofjof|pochakofjof]] || [[word:pochakofshof|pochakofshof]] || [[word:pochakofkof|pochakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochakïfthïf|pochakïfthïf]] || [[word:pochakïfjïf|pochakïfjïf]] || [[word:pochakïfshïf|pochakïfshïf]] || [[word:pochakïfkïf|pochakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochakïfthïfthïf|pochakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:pochakïfjïfjïf|pochakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:pochakïfshïfshïf|pochakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:pochakïfkïfkïf|pochakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochakïfthïf|pochakïfthïf]] || [[word:pochakïfjïf|pochakïfjïf]] || [[word:pochakïfshïf|pochakïfshïf]] || [[word:pochakïfkïf|pochakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochakïfthïf|pochakïfthïf]] || [[word:pochakïfjïf|pochakïfjïf]] || [[word:pochakïfshïf|pochakïfshïf]] || [[word:pochakïfkïf|pochakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochakæthæ|pochakæthæ]] || [[word:pochakæjæ|pochakæjæ]] || [[word:pochakæshæ|pochakæshæ]] || [[word:pochakækæ|pochakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochakathatha|pochakathatha]] || [[word:pochakajaja|pochakajaja]] || [[word:pochakashasha|pochakashasha]] || [[word:pochakakaka|pochakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochakatha|pochakatha]] || [[word:pochakaja|pochakaja]] || [[word:pochakasha|pochakasha]] || [[word:pochakaka|pochakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochakafthaf|pochakafthaf]] || [[word:pochakafjaf|pochakafjaf]] || [[word:pochakafshaf|pochakafshaf]] || [[word:pochakafkaf|pochakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pochakasha|pochakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pochakshësha|pochakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pochakrosha|pochakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pochakmusha|pochakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pochakyasha|pochakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopochaknkshësha|gopochaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopochaknkrosha|gopochaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopochaknkmusha|gopochaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopochaknkyasha|gopochaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pochachakasha|pochachakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pochachakshësha|pochachakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pochachakrosha|pochachakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pochachakmusha|pochachakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pochachakyasha|pochachakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopochachaknkshësha|gopochachaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopochachaknkrosha|gopochachaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopochachaknkmusha|gopochachaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopochachaknkyasha|gopochachaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pechækasha|pechækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pechækshësha|pechækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pechækrosha|pechækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pechækmusha|pechækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pechækyasha|pechækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopechæknkshësha|gopechæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopechæknkrosha|gopechæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopechæknkmusha|gopechæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopechæknkyasha|gopechæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pochfakasha|pochfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pochfakshësha|pochfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pochfakrosha|pochfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pochfakmusha|pochfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pochfakyasha|pochfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopochfaknkshësha|gopochfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopochfaknkrosha|gopochfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopochfaknkmusha|gopochfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopochfaknkyasha|gopochfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
